allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add post-processing features, per-shader params, and checkerboard fix

- Histogram panel: live RGB histogram widget below viewport with debounced updates
- Adjustment layers: toggle/edit/remove baked chain entries with full replay
- AOV render passes: normals, depth, diffuse, AO views for 3D mode
- Per-shader params: add brightness, contrast, saturation, gamma, hue_shift,
  vignette to all 87 shaders \(smart per-shader PP to avoid double-application\)
- Passthrough shader: checkerboard background no longer affected by shader effects
- Bonus: u_resolution uniform now set in viewport rendering for shader consistency
- UI: smaller bake/reset/undo/redo buttons, removed category dropdown
- Build: updated spec entry point to shader_studio_v3.py
- Claude Code: added hooks, skills, updated CLAUDE.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(python -c "modes = [''normal'', ''multiply'', ''screen'', ''overlay'', ''add'', ''subtract'', ''color dodge'', ''color burn'', ''soft light'', ''hard light'', ''difference'', ''exclusion'', ''hue'', ''saturation'', ''color'', ''luminosity'']; [print\(repr\(m.title\(\)\)\) for m in modes]")

hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json; event=json.load(sys.stdin); path=event.get('input',{}).get('file_path',''); bad=['.bak','shader_studio_v2.py','shader_studio.py']; match=[b for b in bad if path.endswith(b)]; print(f'BLOCKED: {match[0]} is a protected file. Only edit shader_studio_v3.py') if match else None; sys.exit(1 if match else 0)"

python -c "import sys,json; event=json.load(sys.stdin); path=event.get('input',{}).get('file_path',''); exec('import py_compile; py_compile.compile(path, doraise=True)') if path.endswith('.py') else None"
